inputs.model.prompt: Starting from the front view, the camera slowly orbits behind the TV-headed figure, settling over its shoulder and looking out across the dim, blurred office into the darkness beyond. A deep ambient bass tone hums. The figure doesn't move, but the screen's glow casts a faint rectangle of light forward into the dark room. TV Head (quietly): "Something's out there." The screen flickers once. "It's been watching us back."
inputs.model.negative_prompt: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走，字幕，文本
